rollback_scope: Revert AO2 PR #258 if the versioned hash vector fixture or migration-boundary documentation is later found incorrect.
rollback_command: Prepare a reviewed AO2 revert PR for merge commit 0d4f0dedd77e2356c18fd7f8155f78e06696d59b and regenerate the Atlas readback; do not mutate main directly.
data_loss_risk: none; the change adds a fixture, documentation, and regression coverage for canonical hash vectors
